## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped narrowly and intentionally.
- [ ] No raw, frozen, restricted, or other disallowed runtime data was committed.
- [ ] No prior tables, figures, or conclusions were imported from outside this repo.
- [ ] Documentation and contracts were updated when required.
